title: No Noise Cave Entrances
description: Removes giant cave entrances from your world.
body:
## About
This Light weight Mod/Datapack removes some of the Vanilla noise cave surface entrences. ### Example:
**Before:** ![Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9afdff70e232d7042e589914274fbad574d02e13.jpeg) **After:** ![With Datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8b51f6c51e6d87b1182c89bc847a9569bf06101.jpeg) If you like what you see here then check out some of my other projects:
- [Basic Smooth Worldgen Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/basic-smooth-worldgen)
- [Additional Totems](https://modrinth.com/datapack/additional-totems)
- [Additional Biomes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/additional-biomes)
- [Additional Steps](https://modrinth.com/datapack/additional-steps)
